scenario: presentationFor('skill') — renderer + action for each skill package (valid or not). Presentation is keyed on the open `type`, so validity does not change rendering. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's byRelPath shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
notes: SPECIFICATION golden — every skill renders via the `skill-md` renderer regardless of validity (presentation keys on type=skill, not on lint status). The invalid skills still render; their violations only affect validate()/lint output.
action string is the src/core/type-presentation.ts form for `skill`: `akm show <ref> -> follow the instructions`.
